HomePage.title: Get briefed before your next job interview
HomePage.description: Paste your CV and a job description. Applai analyzes the match, highlights gaps, and generates tailored interview questions — in seconds.
HomePage.footer: Built with Next.js 16, Claude AI, and shadcn/ui
